subcodes.first_line: O thou who drinkest the choice wine of My utterance, who art remembered by My Pen, and who soarest in Mine atmosphere! The Branch hath appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الشارب رحیق بیانی و المذکور من قلمی و الطائر فی هوائی قد حضر الغصن
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @power of prayer, @praise and encouragement
